curriculum.title: BaroKids – Manhajka Waxbarashada Soomaalida
curriculum.subtitle: Somali Children's Learning Curriculum
curriculum.author: BaroKids Curriculum Team
curriculum.description: A complete play-based curriculum for Somali children covering the Alphabet, Numbers, Colors, Animals, and Islamic foundations. Each lesson is structured for short attention spans, with voice scripts, vocabulary, interactive quizzes, and motivational reward messages.
curriculum.pedagogyNotes: Lessons are ordered from concrete to abstract. Each unit builds on the previous. Voice scripts are written in warm, encouraging Somali suitable for a narrator or text-to-speech. Quiz questions progress from recognition → recall → application.

units.unitDescription: Children learn all 21 letters of the Somali alphabet through songs, pictures, and words. Each letter is paired with a familiar Somali word.

lessons.title: Xarfaha A ilaa D
lessons.objective: Child can recognise and name the letters A, B, C, and D and say a Somali word beginning with each letter.

voiceScript.intro: Assalamu Calaykum, oo ku soo dhawow BaroKids! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa xarfaha Soomaaliga. Diyaar ma tahay? Aan bilownno!

letterByLetter.script: Xarfaha kowaad waa A. Akhri: A! A waxay u taagan tahay 'Af'. Af waa halka aad ku hadasha. Soo noqo oo ku dheh: A!
Xarfaha labaad waa B. Akhri: B! B waxay u taagan tahay 'Bahal'. Bahalku waa xayawaanka. Ku dheh: B!
Xarfaha sadexaad waa C. Akhri: C! C waxay u taagan tahay 'Caano'. Caanaha waa cad yihiin oo macaan. Ku dheh: C!
Xarfaha afraad waa D. Akhri: D! D waxay u taagan tahay 'Dab'. Dabka kulul yahay, ha taabin. Ku dheh: D!

voiceScript.song: Heesta xarfaha: A waa Af, B waa Bahal, C waa Caano, D waa Dab! Ku noqo mar kale: A-B-C-D! Aad baad u fiicantahay!
voiceScript.closing: Barakallahu feekum! Waad bartay xarfaha A, B, C, iyo D. Xiddig ayaad xaqiisay. Ilaa baraha xiga!

quiz.instructions: Jawaab su'aalaha hoose. Dooro jawaabta saxda ah.

questions.question: Xarfaha 'A' magaca waa?
questions.questionEn: The letter A stands for which Somali word?
questions.explanation: A waxay u taagan tahay 'Af' – halka aad ku hadasha!

questions.question: Ku habboon xarfaha erayga saxda ah
questions.questionEn: Match the letter to the correct word

questions.question: 'Dab' macneheedu waa?
questions.explanation: Dab macneheedu waa Fire – kulul yahay!

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Aad baad u fiicantahay! Waad bartay xarfaha A, B, C, iyo D. Xiddig ⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You did amazing! You learned letters A, B, C, and D. You earned a star! ⭐

lessons.title: Xarfaha E ilaa H
lessons.objective: Child can recognise and say the letters E, F, G, and H with matching Somali vocabulary words.

voiceScript.intro: Assalamu Calaykum oo ku soo dhawow! Waxaad horeba bartay A, B, C, D. Aad baad u fiicantahay! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa E, F, G, iyo H.

letterByLetter.script: E waxay u taagan tahay 'Eel'. Eelku waa kalluun dheer oo biyaha ku nool. Ku dheh: E!
F waxay u taagan tahay 'Fool'. Foolkaagu waa qurux badan yahay! Ku dheh: F!
G waxay u taagan tahay 'Guri'. Gurigu waa halka aad ku seexato. Ku dheh: G!
H waxay u taagan tahay 'Hilib'. Hilibku waa cunto macaan. Ku dheh: H!

voiceScript.song: E waa Eel, F waa Fool, G waa Guri, H waa Hilib! Ku noqo: E-F-G-H! Waa aad u fiicantahay!
voiceScript.closing: Subhanallah! Waad bartay E, F, G, iyo H. Xiddig ⭐ ayaad xaqiisay. Si fiican u joogso!

questions.question: G xarfahu waxay u taagan tahay erayga?
questions.questionEn: The letter G stands for which word?
questions.explanation: Guri waa house – halka aad ku seexato!

questions.question: 'Fool' macneheedu waa House.
questions.explanation: Maya! Fool macneheedu waa Face (Wejiga). Guri ayaa la yidhaa House.

rewardMessage.somali: Subhanallah! Waad xariirtay! E, F, G, H – dhammaan baad bartay. Xiddigyo ⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!
rewardMessage.english: Subhanallah! You are so smart! You learned E, F, G, H. You earned 2 stars! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xarfaha I ilaa L
lessons.objective: Child recognises I, J, K, L and matches each to a familiar Somali word.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Aad baad u fiicantahay waxa aad horay u baratay. Maanta waxaan baranaynaa I, J, K, iyo L. Diyaar?

letterByLetter.script: I waxay u taagan tahay 'Ilmo'. Ilmo macneheedu waa child. Adiga adigaa ilmo yar oo garaad badan! Ku dheh: I!
J waxay u taagan tahay 'Jilaal'. Jilaalku waa xilli xagaaga Soomaaliya. Ku dheh: J!
K waxay u taagan tahay 'Kaluun'. Kaluunka waxaad arkaa badda. Ku dheh: K!
L waxay u taagan tahay 'Libaax'. Libaaxu waa boqorka xayawaanka – aad u xoogan! Ku dheh: L!

voiceScript.song: I waa Ilmo, J waa Jilaal, K waa Kaluun, L waa Libaax! Ku noqo: I-J-K-L! Waa aad u fiicantahay!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad bartay I, J, K, iyo L. Aad baad u xariirtay. Xiddigyo ⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!

questions.question: Xarfaha K waxay u taagan tahay?
Calaamadda 🦁 xarfaha kee ayay ku bilaabataa?
questions.questionEn: The 🦁 emoji – which letter does it start with?

questions.question: Kaluunka wuxuu ku noolaa dhulka.
questions.explanation: Maya! Kaluunku wuxuu ku noolaa badda.

rewardMessage.somali: Waw! Aad baad u xariirtay! I, J, K, L – dhammaan baad u bartay. Libaax baad u dheer tahay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Wow! You're so clever! You learned I, J, K, L. You're as brave as a lion! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xarfaha M ilaa Q
lessons.objective: Child learns M, N, O, Q with Somali keywords and can repeat each letter-word pair.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa M, N, O, iyo Q. Keen dhegahaaga oo diyaar u noqo!

letterByLetter.script: M waxay u taagan tahay 'Malab'. Malabku waa xaawo macaan oo shinnidu samaysaa. Ku dheh: M!
N waxay u taagan tahay 'Naag'. Naagtu waa hooyadaa iyo xaaskaa. Ku dheh: N!
O waxay u taagan tahay 'Ood'. Ooddu waxay ilaalisa gurigoodda. Ku dheh: O!
Q waxay u taagan tahay 'Qori'. Qorigu waa alwaax ama usha. Ku dheh: Q!

voiceScript.song: M waa Malab, N waa Naag, O waa Ood, Q waa Qori! M-N-O-Q! Ku noqo mar kale!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad bartay M, N, O, Q. Mahadsanid! Xiddigyo ⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!

questions.question: M xarfahu waxay u taagan tahay?
Ooddu waxay bilaabataa xarfaha O.
questions.explanation: Haa! Ood waxay ku bilaabataa xarfaha O!

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Malabka oo kale ayaad macaan tahay! M, N, O, Q – dhammaan baad bartay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You're as sweet as honey! You mastered M, N, O, Q! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xarfaha R ilaa W
lessons.objective: Child learns R, S, T, U, W and can recall the Somali keyword for each letter.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa R, S, T, U, iyo W. Waa xarfo aad u muhiim ah!

letterByLetter.script: R waxay u taagan tahay 'Roob'. Roobku waa barako Alle. Geedaha roobka ayay koraan. Ku dheh: R!
S waxay u taagan tahay 'Suuq'. Suuqga waa halka cuntooyinka laga iibsado. Ku dheh: S!
T waxay u taagan tahay 'Timir'. Timirtu waa miro macaan Nebi Mahamed (scw) ay jeclaayeen. Ku dheh: T!
U waxay u taagan tahay 'Ukun'. Ukunka ka yimid digaagga. Ku dheh: U!
W waxay u taagan tahay 'Waxbarasho'. Waxbarashadu waa furaha guusha. Adiga oo baranaya BaroKids, aad baad u fiicantahay! Ku dheh: W!

voiceScript.song: R waa Roob, S waa Suuq, T waa Timir, U waa Ukun, W waa Waxbarasho! R-S-T-U-W!
voiceScript.closing: Allahu Akbar! Aad baad u fiicantahay! Waad bartay R, S, T, U, W. Xiddigyo ⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!

questions.question: W xarfahu waxay u taagan tahay?
T waxay u taagan tahay '___' oo ah miro macaan.
Ukunka ka yimid libaaxga.
questions.questionEn: The egg came from a lion.

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Waxbarashadu waa furaha guusha – adiga oo baranaya waa guul! R, S, T, U, W – dhammaan baad bartay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! Education is the key to success – you're doing it! You mastered R, S, T, U, W! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xarfaha X, Y, Z
lessons.objective: Child completes the full alphabet by learning the final letters X, Y, Z.

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Ubadka yar waa qurux badan yahay.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan dhammaynaa xarfaha Soomaaliga oo dhan! Waxaan baranaynaa X, Y, iyo Z – xarfaha ugu dambeeya!

letterByLetter.script: X waxay u taagan tahay 'Xiddig'. Xiddigaha habeenka waad arki kartaa. Adiga xiddigahan oo kale ayaad u dhalanteed! Ku dheh: X!
Y waxay u taagan tahay 'Yar'. Yar macneheedu waa small. Adiga adigaa yar laakiin garaad badan! Ku dheh: Y!
Z waxay u taagan tahay 'Zool'. Zoolku waa xayawaanka malaabka ah ee luqunta dheer. Ku dheh: Z!

voiceScript.song: X waa Xiddig, Y waa Yar, Z waa Zool! X-Y-Z! Hadda waxaad baratay xarfaha oo dhan! Alxamdulillah!
voiceScript.closing: Subhanallah! Waad dhamaysay xarfaha Soomaaliga oo dhan – A ilaa Z! Aad baad u xariirtay! Xiddigyo ⭐⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!

questions.question: Z waxay u taagan tahay xayawaanka?
Xarfaha ugu dambeeya waa?
questions.questionEn: The last letter of the alphabet is?

rewardMessage.somali: ALXAMDULILLAH! Waad dhamaysay dhammaan xarfaha Soomaaliga – A ilaa Z! Aad baad u xariirtay! Badge cusub ⭐⭐⭐ baad xaqiisay!
rewardMessage.english: ALHAMDULILLAH! You completed ALL the Somali letters – A to Z! You're incredible! New badge + 3 stars! ⭐⭐⭐

lessons.title: Ku celcel Xarfaha oo dhan
lessons.objective: Child reviews all 21 Somali letters through a comprehensive mixed quiz.

vocabulary.exampleSentence: Akhri: A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, N, O, Q, R, S, T, U, W, X, Y, Z!

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan ku celcelinaynaa dhammaan xarfaha Soomaaliga. Diyaar? Aan bilownno A!
voiceScript.fullAlphabetChant: A waa Af, B waa Bahal, C waa Caano, D waa Dab, E waa Eel, F waa Fool, G waa Guri, H waa Hilib, I waa Ilmo, J waa Jilaal, K waa Kaluun, L waa Libaax, M waa Malab, N waa Naag, O waa Ood, Q waa Qori, R waa Roob, S waa Suuq, T waa Timir, U waa Ukun, W waa Waxbarasho, X waa Xiddig, Y waa Yar, Z waa Zool!
voiceScript.closing: Mashallah! Waad bartay dhammaan xarfaha Soomaaliga. Adiga waxbarasho baad jeclahay – taas ayaa xiddigaha kaa dhigta!

quiz.instructions: Weyddiimaha badan oo kala duwan jawaab.

rewardMessage.somali: ALLAHU AKBAR! Guul weyn! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Xarfaha oo dhan! Adiga waxaa kuu horseeday waxbarashadaadu! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: ALLAHU AKBAR! Incredible achievement! You completed the entire Alphabet Unit! Your love of learning is your superpower! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

units.unitDescription: Children learn to count in Somali from 1 to 20, identify written numbers, and use numbers in simple sentences.

lessons.title: Tirooyin 1–5
lessons.objective: Child can count from 1 to 5 in Somali and match each number to a quantity of objects.

voiceScript.intro: Assalamu Calaykum! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa timaaddada – tirooyin Soomaaliga! Bilownno 1 ilaa 5. Ku raac:
voiceScript.countingChant: Kow! Laba! Saddex! Afar! Shan! Mar kale: Kow, Laba, Saddex, Afar, Shan!

numberByNumber.script: Kow – hal wax. Halkaa gacantaada hal farood taas. Waa kow!
Laba – laba wax. Laba farood taas. Waa laba!
Saddex – saddex wax. Saddex farood taas. Waa saddex!
Afar – afar wax. Afar farood taas. Waa afar!
Shan – shan wax. Gacantaada oo dhan taas – shan farood! Waa shan!

voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad baratay kow, laba, saddex, afar, shan. Xiddigyo ⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!

questions.question: Tartib sax ah u saar: Shan, Kow, Saddex, Laba, Afar

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Waad baratay Kow, Laba, Saddex, Afar, Shan! Gacantaadaa caddaynaysa – shan farood! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned One through Five! Your five fingers say it all! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Tirooyin 6–10
lessons.objective: Child counts 6–10 in Somali and identifies written number symbols.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Waad horeba baratay 1 ilaa 5. Aad baad u fiicantahay! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa 6 ilaa 10!
voiceScript.countingChant: Lix! Toddoba! Siddeed! Sagaal! Toban! Ku noqo: Lix, Toddoba, Siddeed, Sagaal, Toban!

numberByNumber.script: Lix – maalintu shan + kow. Lix waa tirada 6! Laba gacmood shan farood iyo hal farood kale. Waa lix!
Toddoba – usbuuca toddoba maalin ayuu leeyahay: Isniin, Talaado, Arbaco, Khamiis, Jimco, Sabti, Axad. Waa toddoba!
Siddeed – xayawaanada badankoodu siddeed lugood ma laha. Waa siddeed!
Sagaal – aad u dhow toban. Sagaal + kow = toban! Waa sagaal!
Toban – laba gacmood oo dhan. Dhammaan fartaha adiga. Waa toban!

voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad baratay lix, toddoba, siddeed, sagaal, toban. Hadda waad tirin kartaa 1 ilaa 10! ⭐⭐

questions.question: Usbuuca maalin imisa ayuu leeyahay?
questions.questionEn: How many days in a week?

rewardMessage.somali: Waw! Waad tirin kartaa 1 ilaa 10! Toban xiddig oo kale ayaad tahay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Wow! You can count 1 to 10! You shine like ten stars! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Tirooyin 11–20
lessons.objective: Child learns compound Somali number names 11–20 and understands the pattern (X iyo toban).
lessons.patternNote: Somali numbers 11–19 follow the pattern: [unit] + 'iyo toban' (lit. 'and ten'). 20 is its own word: Labaatan.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Waad baratay 1 ilaa 10 – aad baad u fiicantahay! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa 11 ilaa 20. Qaab fudud ayey leedahay!
voiceScript.patternExplanation: Soomaali, 11 ilaa 19 waxay u sheegaan sidaan: tirada + 'iyo toban'. Tusaale: 11 = Kow (1) iyo toban (+ 10) = Kow iyo toban!
voiceScript.countingChant: Kow iyo toban, Laba iyo toban, Saddex iyo toban, Afar iyo toban, Shan iyo toban, Lix iyo toban, Toddoba iyo toban, Siddeed iyo toban, Sagaal iyo toban, LABAATAN!
voiceScript.closing: Subhanallah! Waad baratay 1 ilaa 20 oo dhan! Aad baad u xariirtay! ⭐⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Waad tirin kartaa Kow ilaa Labaatan! Xiddigyo ⭐⭐⭐ ayaad xaqiisay!
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You can count from One to Twenty! You earned 3 stars! ⭐⭐⭐

lessons.title: Ku celcel Tirooyin + Xisaab Fudud
lessons.objective: Child reviews 1–20 and solves simple addition and subtraction word problems in Somali.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa xisaab fudud. Saddex ku saddex waa lix. Diyaar?
voiceScript.wordProblemIntro: Aan isku daynno: Hooyaday suuqa ayay ku iibsatay shan canjeelo. Aabbahay laba kale ayuu keenay. Imisa canjeelo ayaan haystaa? Shan + Laba = Toddoba! Aad baad u fiicantahay!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Aad baad u fiicantahay! Xisaabta Soomaaliga ayaad bartay! ⭐⭐⭐

questions.question: Ubadku shan tufaax ayuu hayay. Laba ayuu cunay. Intuu u hadhay?
questions.questionEn: A child had 5 apples and ate 2. How many are left?

rewardMessage.somali: ALLAHU AKBAR! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Tirooyin oo dhan! Xisaab macaan baad baratay! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: ALLAHU AKBAR! You completed the entire Numbers Unit! You're a math star! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

units.unitDescription: Children learn the Somali names for 12 colors, identify them in nature, and use color words in sentences.

lessons.title: Midabada Aasaasiga ah
lessons.objective: Child learns 6 core colors in Somali and identifies them in everyday objects.

voiceScript.intro: Assalamu Calaykum! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa midabada – colors! Dunidu waa midab badan tahay oo qurux leh!

colorByColor.script: Cas waa Red. Tamarta cas tahay! Ku dheh: Cas!
Cagaar waa Green. Geedka cagaar yahay! Ku dheh: Cagaar!
Buluug waa Blue. Samadu buluug tahay! Ku dheh: Buluug!
Huruud waa Yellow. Qorraxdu huruud tahay! Ku dheh: Huruud!
Cad waa White. Barafka cad yahay! Ku dheh: Cad!
Madow waa Black. Habeenka madow yahay! Ku dheh: Madow!

voiceScript.song: Cas, Cagaar, Buluug, Huruud, Cad, Madow – midabada dunida oo dhan ku jira! Ku noqo: Cas, Cagaar, Buluug, Huruud, Cad, Madow!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad baratay midabada muhiimka ah! ⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Midabada dunida baad bartay! Cas, Cagaar, Buluug, Huruud, Cad, Madow! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned the colors of the world! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Midabada Kale
lessons.objective: Child learns 6 additional Somali color words and uses them in descriptive sentences.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa midab kale oo cusub! Nabad iyo caano!

colorByColor.script: Oranjo – liin macaan waa oranjo. Midab kulul oo farxad leh! Ku dheh: Oranjo!
Guduud – midab fiican oo qaaligga ah. Ku dheh: Guduud!
Bunni – dhulka midabkiisu waa bunni. Qaarankana wuu bunni yahay. Ku dheh: Bunni!
Warqad – ubaxa wardadu waa warqad. Aad u qurux badan! Ku dheh: Warqad!
Cagaaran – biyaha badweynta midabkiisu waa cagaaran. Ku dheh: Cagaaran!
Dhadeer – daruuraha marka ay badan yihiin waa dhadeer. Ku dheh: Dhadeer!

voiceScript.closing: Subhanallah! Waad baratay midabada kale. Aad baad u fiicantahay! ⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Waw! Aad baad u fiicantahay! Midabada kala duwan oo dhan baad bartay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Wow! Amazing! You've learned all the different colors! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Ku celcel Midabada + Jumlad
lessons.objective: Child reviews all colors and forms descriptive sentences using Somali color words.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan isticmaalaynaa midabada jumlooyin gudahood. Waxaan dhihi doonaa: Samadu waa buluug. Adna ku raac!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Midabada! Aad baad u fiicantahay! ⭐⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: ALLAHU AKBAR! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Midabada oo dhan! Aad baad u midab badantahay sida xiddigaha! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: ALLAHU AKBAR! You completed the entire Colors Unit! You're as colorful as the stars! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

units.unitDescription: Children learn 20 Somali animal names, their sounds, habitats, and a fun fact about each. Includes African savanna animals, sea animals, farm animals, and Somali native species.

lessons.title: Xayawaanka Berriga
lessons.objective: Child learns 6 land animals and their Somali names, sounds, and a fun fact.

vocabulary.fact: Maroodigu waa ka weyn dhammaan xayawaanka dhulka.
Geelu wuxuu aadi karaa muddo dheer biya la'aanteed.
Libaax dooggu waa kan ugu degdegta xayawaanka.
Maroodi yarka leeyahay xariiqo cas iyo cad.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa xayawaanka berriga. Diyaar? Aan bilownno libaaxga!

animalByAnimal.script: Libaax! Roar! Libaaxu waa boqorka xayawaanka. Aad u xoogan! Ku dheh: Libaax!
Maroodi! Trumpet! Maroodigu waa aad u weyn. Lugihiisu waa waaweyn. Ku dheh: Maroodi!
Geel! Grunting! Geelu wuxuu noolaan karaa cidlada oo kulul. Xayawaanka Soomaalida! Ku dheh: Geel!
Libaax doog! Ama Haramcad! Waa kan ugu degdegta! Ku dheh: Libaax doog!
Zebra! Waxay leedahay xariiqo madow iyo cad. Aad u qurux badan! Ku dheh: Maroodi yar!
Daayeer! Chatter! Daayeertu waxay naagtaa geedaha. Ku dheh: Daayeer!

voiceScript.closing: Subhanallah! Alle ayaa abuuray xayawaankaan oo dhan! Waad baratay lix xayawaan oo berriga ah! ⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Xayawaanka berriga oo dhan baad bartay! Libaax baad u dheer tahay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned all the land animals! You're as brave as a lion! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xayawaanka Badda
lessons.objective: Child learns 5 sea animals in Somali and facts about ocean life.

vocabulary.fact: Kaluunka baddu wuu dabbaalan karaa xawli sareeya.
Doofinku waa aad u caqli badan, wuxuuna xiriiri karaa aadanaha.
Danaaska waa xayawaanka badda ugu xoog badan.
Xubbullada leeyihiin xanniibo adag iyo gacmo labaatan.
Abeesadu waa ka weyn dhammaan xayawaanka badda.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa xayawaanka badda. Soomaaliya badda dhinaceedu aad u qurux badan yahay! Diyaar?
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Badda iyo xayawaankeeda baad baratay. Subhanallah – Alle ayaa iyaga abuuray! ⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Subhanallah! Xayawaanka badda baad baratay. Badda Soomaaliya oo qurux badan sida adiga! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Subhanallah! You learned the sea animals. As beautiful as the Somali ocean! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Xayawaanka Reerka
lessons.objective: Child learns farm and domestic animals commonly found in Somali homes and farms.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa xayawaanka reerka – xayawaanka guriga ku nool ama beerta. Diyaar?

animalByAnimal.script: Lo'! Moo! Lo'du waxay bixisaa caano macaan. Alle ha barako! Ku dheh: Lo'!
Ri! Meh! Rigu wuxuu cunaa caws. Xayawaanka reerka! Ku dheh: Ri!
Digaag! Cock-a-doodle! Digaagu wuxuu bixiyaa ukun. Subxii ayuu u dhawaaqa. Ku dheh: Digaag!
Faras! Neigh! Farasku waa xoogan yahay oo dhakhso ah. Ku dheh: Faras!
Ido – ama adhi. Baa! Iduhu waxay bixisaa hilib iyo dhogor. Ku dheh: Ido!

voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Xayawaanka reerka oo dhan baad baratay! ⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Xayawaanka reerka oo dhan baad bartay. Adiga oo beeralay cusub! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned all farm animals. You're a little farmer! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Ku celcel Xayawaanka oo dhan
lessons.objective: Child reviews all animal groups, names, and habitats in a comprehensive mixed quiz.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan dhammaynaa Cutubka Xayawaanka. Weyddiimaha kala duwan ayaan qabanayaa. Diyaar?
voiceScript.closing: ALLAHU AKBAR! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Xayawaanka oo dhan! Alle ayaa abuuray xayawaankaan oo kala duwan – Subhanallah! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: ALLAHU AKBAR! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Xayawaanka oo dhan! Badge cusub! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: ALLAHU AKBAR! You completed the entire Animals Unit! New badge unlocked! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

units.unitDescription: Children learn the foundations of Islam in a gentle, joyful, age-appropriate way. Covers the Five Pillars, Pillars of Faith, daily duas, the 99 Names of Allah (introductory), and Somali Islamic phrases.
units.ageNote: Lessons are adapted for different age groups. Ages 2–4 focus on duas and phrases. Ages 5–8 cover pillars and deeper concepts.

lessons.title: Bismillah – Marxaladda Koowaad
lessons.objective: Child learns the meaning of key Islamic phrases used daily and understands Alla's love for them.

vocabulary.somali: Magaca Alle ayaan ku bilaabayaa, Naxariistadiisana waa dhammaystiran tahay
vocabulary.english: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

vocabulary.somali: Alle waa quduus/waa nadiif ah ammaantiisa
vocabulary.when: Marka aad wax la yaab leh aragto

vocabulary.english: As Allah has willed (expression of praise)

voiceScript.intro: Assalamu Calaykum warahmatullahi wabarakaatuh! Ku soo dhawow BaroKids Islamic! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa erayo Islaamiga muhiimka ah ee maalin kasta logu isticmaalo.

phraseByPhrase.script: Marka aad wax kasta bilaabayso – cuntada, waxbarashada, orodka – dheh: BISMILLAH! Waxay macnaheedu tahay – Magaca Alle ayaan ku bilaabayaa. Ku dheh: Bismillah!
Marka wax kuu yimid oo fiican – cunto, caafi maad, farxad – dheh: ALXAMDULILLAH! Mahad Alle. Ku dheh: Alxamdulillah!
Marka xiddigaha aragto, ubaxyada quruxda leh aragto – dheh: SUBHANALLAH! Alle maaweelo! Ku dheh: Subhanallah!
Alle wuu ka weyn yahay wax walba. ALLAHU AKBAR! Ku dheh: Allahu Akbar!
Haddaad dhahayso 'berri ayaan ciyaari doonaa', dheh: INSHALLAH. Hadduu Alle doono. Ku dheh: Inshallah!
Marka ilmo qurux badani tago – MASHALLAH! Marka baad martay – MASHALLAH! Ku dheh: Mashallah!

voiceScript.closing: Barakallahu feekum! Erayo Islaamiga baad baratay. Maalin kasta isticmaal! ⭐⭐

questions.question: Marka aad cunto bilaabayso maxaad tiraahda?
Marka aad wax la yaab leh aragto maxaad tiraahda?

rewardMessage.somali: Barakallahu feekum! Erayo Islaamiga baad bartay! Maalin kasta Bismillah dheh marka aad wax bilabayso! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Barakallahu feekum! You learned Islamic phrases! Say Bismillah every time you start something! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Allaha waa Midho – Tawhiidka Carruurta
lessons.titleEn: Allah is One – Tawheed for Children
lessons.objective: Child understands in an age-appropriate way that Allah is One, the Creator, and loves His creation.

vocabulary.somali: Ma jiro ilaah xaq ah marka laga reebo Alle
vocabulary.english: There is no god worthy of worship except Allah

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa wax aad muhiim u ah – Alle ayaanu baranaynaa. Alle waa cidda abuurtay samada, dhulka, xiddigaha, xayawaanka, adiga iyo aniga.

conceptByConept.script: Alle waa mid keliya. Ma jiro ilaah kale. Kaliya Alle ayaannu caabudnaa. Ku dheh: Alle waa mid!
Alle buu abuurtay samada iyo dhulka. Alle buu abuurtay xiddigaha habeenka. Alle buu abuurtay adiga oo qurux badan! Ku dheh: Alle wuu abuurtay!
Alle wuu noo jeclahay naxariis weyn oo aan dhammaatayn. Marwalba na ilaalinayaa. Ku dheh: Alle wuu na jeclahay!
Marka aad Ducayn lahayd – in kasta oo naqdi ah – Alle wuu kaa maqlayaa. Ku xira Alle! Ku dheh: Alle wuu na maqli karaa!

voiceScript.song: Alle waa mid, Alle wuu na jeclahay, Alle buu abuurtay wax walba! La ilaaha illallah!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Barashada Tawhiidka baad bilaawday. Alle wuu ku jeclahay adiga! ⭐⭐

questions.question: Alle wuu noo jeclahay.
questions.explanation: Haa! Alle wuu noo jeclahay naxariis weyn!

questions.question: La ilaaha ___ – ma jiro ilaah kale marka laga reebo Alle.

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Tawhiidka baad baratay – Alle waa Mid! Alle wuu kuu farxaa in aad baratay! ⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned Tawheed – Allah is One! Allah is pleased with your learning! ⭐⭐

lessons.title: Tiimurka Islaamka – Salaadda
lessons.objective: Child learns the 5 daily prayers, their times, and the importance of prayer in Islam.
lessons.pillarsNote: Salaaddu waa tiimurka labaad ee Islaamka. Waxay ku dhacdaa shan jeer maalin kasta.

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa salaadda – Tiimurka Labaad ee Islaamka. Salaaddu waa xiriirka u dhexeeya Alle iyo adiga. Shan jeer maalin kasta!

prayerByPrayer.script: Subax – marka qorraxdu soo baxayso oo aadan arkaynin. Laba rakaah. Alle baad ku salaamayso waaberi fiican! Ku dheh: Salaadda Subaxda!
Duhr – dhexe maalintu. Afar rakaah. Marka aad shaqada u joogtid, Alle baad xasuusataa. Ku dheh: Salaadda Duurtiga!
Casr – galabtii. Afar rakaah. Galabnimada quruxda leh – Alle baad salaamayso! Ku dheh: Salaadda Casriga!
Maqrib – marka qorraxdu dhacdo. Saddex rakaah. Habeenka marka ay bilaabato, Alle baad bogaadinayso. Ku dheh: Salaadda Maqribka!
Cisho – habeennimada. Afar rakaah. Hore u seexo – Alle wuu kaa ilaalinayaa. Ku dheh: Salaadda Cishadda!

voiceScript.song: Subax, Duhr, Casr, Maqrib, Cisho – shan salaadood maalin kasta! Shan, shan, shan – Alle baan salaamaynaa!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Salaadaha shan baad baratay. Maanta salaadda Subaxda ku dheh! ⭐⭐⭐

questions.question: Safafka saxda ah u saar salaadaha

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Salaadaha shan baad bartay. Salaaddu waa nuurka qalbiga! ⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned the five daily prayers. Prayer is the light of the heart! ⭐⭐⭐

lessons.title: Tiimurka Islaamka – Shan Tiimuurood
lessons.objective: Child learns and can name all Five Pillars of Islam with their Somali names and simple explanations.

vocabulary.name: Shahaadada
vocabulary.somali: La miraahato inaanu jirin ilaah marka laga reebo Alle, iyo in Muxammad uu yahay rasuulkiisa

vocabulary.name: Xajka
vocabulary.somali: Taga Makkah haddaad awood u leedahay

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa Tiimurka Islaamka – shan tiimuurood oo xoog badan! Islaamku wuxuu ku dhisan yahay shan tiimuurood sida gurigu dhismaha ku dhisan yahay.

pillarByPillar.script: Tiimurka koowaad – Shahaadada. La dheh: La ilaaha illallah Muhammadur Rasulullah. Waxay macnaheedu tahay – Alle keliya ayaan caabudaa, Muxamad na waa rasuulkiis. Tiimurka koowaad!
Tiimurka labaad – Salaadda. Shan jeer maalin kasta. Horeba baad bartay salaadaha! Tiimurka labaad!
Tiimurka sadexaad – Zakadda. Marka aad lacag aad u badan leedahay, qayb ka bixiso miskiinada. Waa saydh. Tiimurka sadexaad!
Tiimurka afraad – Sooma. Ramadaan bilaha qaarkood waxaanu ka koobnaynaa cuntada iyo cabbida maalinta. Alle baan ku xamilaynaa. Tiimurka afraad!
Tiimurka shanaad – Xajka. Haddaad xoog u leedahay, mar ugu dhaqaaq Makkada Mucaddasada. Xajka waa martiqaad Alle. Tiimurka shanaad!

voiceScript.song: Kow Shahaadada, Laba Salaadda, Saddex Zakadda, Afar Sooma, Shan Xajka – shan tiimuurood Islaamka!
voiceScript.closing: Allahu Akbar! Shan Tiimuuroodka Islaamka baad bartay! Aad baad u xariirtay! ⭐⭐⭐

questions.question: Tiimurka Islaamka si sax ah u saar

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Shan Tiimuuroodka Islaamka baad bartay! Muslimka fiican baad tahay! ⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned the Five Pillars of Islam! You are a wonderful Muslim! ⭐⭐⭐

lessons.title: Ducada Maalinlaha
lessons.objective: Child learns 6 everyday duas with their meaning and when to say them.

vocabulary.somali: Magacaaga Allahayow ayaan ku dhintaa oo ku noolaaday
vocabulary.english: In Your name O Allah I die and I live

vocabulary.arabic: الحمد لله الذي أحيانا بعد ما أماتنا
vocabulary.somali: Mahad waxaa leh Alle, ka dib markuu na dhiney noo nooliyey
vocabulary.english: Praise be to Allah who gave us life after causing us to die

vocabulary.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
vocabulary.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khaba'ith
vocabulary.somali: Allahayow, waax iyo xayawaanka xun ayaan ku magangalayaa
vocabulary.english: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from evil spirits
My Lord, increase me in knowledge
Glory to He who has subjected this to us

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa ducooyin maalin kasta logu isticmaalo. Ducada waa xiriirka u dhexeeya adiga iyo Alle – mar walba wuxuu kaa maqayaa!

duaByDua.script: Marka aad cuntada bilaabayso – dheh BISMILLAH. Cuntada dhamaysatay – dheh ALXAMDULILLAH. Sida fudud!
Habeenkii marka aad seexanayso, ku duwid xagal midig, dheh: Bismika Allahumma amuutu wa axya. Alle buu kaa ilaalinayaa habeenka!
Marka aad subax toostid – Alxamdulillah! Alle buu noo nooliyey caawa. Subxana wanaagsan!
Marka aad BaroKids baranayso ama kitaabta fureyso, dheh: Rabbi zidni 'ilma. Robbiyow, aqoon iidheer! Aad u fiican!
Marka aad gaadhiga, baaska ama gaari kale kordhayso – dheh subxanallathii sakhkhara lana haadha. Alla wuu ku ammaan sugayaa!

voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Ducooyin muhiim ah baad baratay. Maalin kasta isticmaal! ⭐⭐⭐

questions.question: Ducada waxaad ku hadlaysaa Alle si toos ah.
questions.explanation: Haa! Ducada waxay kula hadlaysaa Alle si toos ah.

rewardMessage.somali: Mashallah! Ducooyin macaan baad baratay. Alle wuu maqayaa marka aad ducaynayso! ⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: Mashallah! You learned beautiful duas. Allah hears you every time you make dua! ⭐⭐⭐

lessons.title: Nebi Muxamed (SCW) iyo Asmaauhu Husna
lessons.titleEn: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) and Beautiful Names of Allah
lessons.objective: Child learns about the Prophet's gentle character and 10 of Allah's beautiful names (Asma ul-Husna) with meanings.

prophetSection.title: Nebi Muxamed (SCW)

facts.somali: Wuxuu ahaa ninka ugu daacadnaa ee taariikhda
facts.english: He was the most truthful man in history

facts.somali: Naxariis buu u lahayn xayawaanka iyo dadka
facts.english: He showed mercy to animals and people

prophetSection.voiceScript: Nebi Muxamed (Sallallahu Calayhi Wasallam) wuxuu ahaa ninka Alle u diray rasuul. Wuxuu jeclaayee timirta, wuxuu ahaa naxariis badan, wuxuuna u jeclaaday carruurta. Marka aad magiciisa tiraahdo, dheh: Sallallahu Calayhi Wasallam.

asmaaHusna.somali: Naxariista weyn ee dadka oo dhan

voiceScript.intro: Bismillah! Maanta waxaan baranaynaa magacyada quruxda badan ee Alle – Asmaauhu Husna. Alle wuxuu leeyahay 99 magac oo qurux badan.
voiceScript.nameChant: Ar-Rahman, Ar-Raheem – naxariis. Al-Malik – boqor. As-Salam – nabad. Al-Khaliq – abuure. Al-Alim – oge. Al-Qadir – xoogan. As-Samee – maqle. Al-Wadud – jeclaaday!
voiceScript.closing: Alxamdulillah! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Waxbarashada Islaamka oo dhan! Aad baad u fiicantahay! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

rewardMessage.somali: ALLAHU AKBAR! Waad dhamaysay Cutubka Waxbarashada Islaamka oo dhan! Alle wuu ku jeclahay! Badge Islaam baad xaqiisay! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
rewardMessage.english: ALLAHU AKBAR! You completed the entire Islamic Learning Unit! Allah loves you! Islamic badge earned! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

motivationalMessages.english: Education is the key to success!
You are as brave as a lion!
Your mother is proud of you!

motivationalMessages.somali: Maalin kasta barasho cusub – waa guul!
motivationalMessages.english: Each day you learn something new – that's success!

metadata.voiceScriptLanguage: Somali (suitable for human voice actor or Somali TTS)
metadata.recommendedUse: Can be integrated into BaroKids app, used by parents at home, or adapted by Somali community schools
